title: Onboarding for Dashboard apps should allow for creating new dashboard if they don't have any dashboards

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am trying out the flow for our Dashboard app with a test user and noticed that if the user does not have any dashboards, they cannot continue on the installation flow

image744×493 18.6 KB

I think this is leading to huge drop in conversions, especially with users who’ve never used dashboards before.

Instead, there could be an option here to create a new dashboard if they don’t already have one.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @kranthi_thoughtflow for the explanation on the use case and the request!
